chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1700 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.6699/25 (U/A). 2. For orders on CMA No.6700/25 (Ex/A). 3. For hearing of main case. 09.10.2025 Mr. Yameen Ali Khoso, Advocate for the petitioner..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Granted. 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition on the ground the he will avail alternate remedy before proper forum. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
